summary: Build/typecheck/258 unit/33 e2e all green. TEST-001 (blocker) CONFIRMED FIXED via a real Vite-bundled browser (not just Node/jsdom): raw sequence/class/state DSL render native shapes, pie renders via the mermaid fallback, hostile <script> label inert, zero console errors. TEST-002/004/005 confirmed fixed and verified. TEST-003 REOPENED: the anti-parallel/fan-trunk fix reaches the static SVG/PNG renderer but never the interactive DOM (mount/mountAsync/element/-f html export), which still fully reproduces the original occlusion/trunk-convergence via src/render/dom/runtime.ts ignoring edge.ports. New TEST-006 (major): the static-SVG fix that IS complete introduced a label-plate-overlap legibility gap for anti-parallel pairs. Routes back to implement with 2 open/new agent-fixable issues.
